description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat vehicle with a cylindrical turret mounted centrally on a rectangular armored hull. The vehicle is painted in a dusty tan color, with visible rivets and panel lines indicating heavy armor plating. The tracks are wide and robust, designed for traversing rough terrain, and run along the full length of the vehicle's sides. The turret features a small gun barrel protruding from the front and a white star insignia on its side. The front hull displays another white star marking, and the vehicle's overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external accessories. The surface appears weathered, suggesting use in arid or desert environments.
description: A tan, tracked combat vehicle with a cylindrical turret, heavy armor plating, and white star military markings. The design is rugged and utilitarian, with wide tracks and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical turret, central gun barrel, and a prominent white star marking on the hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the tracks, the turret with a side star insignia, and the rectangular armored hull.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the turret and hull, with visible track mechanisms and no markings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the tracks, turret, and hull, but with less visible markings.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible gun barrel mounted on the front of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with visible rivets and panel lines; appears thick and covers all sides including the turret.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan color with weathered, dusty appearance; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblem on the front hull and on the side of the turret.
